message:
test(fuzz): add MeshSessionHelloRetry canonical-CBOR round-trip fuzz (resolves zcva2)

MeshSessionHelloRetry (session.rs:511-518) is the stateless cookie
challenge for hello-retry handshake; has 4 fields with derived serde
but no discrete fuzz coverage.

Three properties:
- canonical-CBOR encode → decode preserves all 4 fields verbatim
- re-encoding determinism: encode(decode(bytes)) == bytes
- JSON serde round-trip preserves all fields

Once-gated anchor: known HelloRetry (anchor-from/anchor-to,
cookie=0xAA×32, timestamp=0x0123456789ABCDEF) round-trips
byte-for-byte through encode → decode → re-encode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -879,5 +879,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_hello_retry_roundtrip"
+path = "fuzz_targets/hello_retry_roundtrip.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
